summary: Pass: prior m7 blockers are resolved. Evidence: McpDetail now tracks and uses currentId after reconnect (stale-ID bug fixed), GET /api/mcp-connections now returns toolCount via hub.getToolCountForProxy, and McpList renders tool counts from toolCount when present.
